title: A Very Merry Christmas
titleZh: 一个非常快乐的圣诞节
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo loses his suitcase at the New York airport and races all over the city to find its owner — with a fun surprise waiting at the end! 🎄

q.en: Where did Grandfather William decide the whole Stilton family would spend Christmas?
q.zh: 威廉爷爷决定斯提尔顿全家去哪里过圣诞节？

options.en: In New York City, at his friend Klondyke MacMouse's home
options.zh: 在纽约，他朋友克隆戴克·麦克鼠的家里

options.en: At Geronimo's mouse hole in New Mouse City
options.zh: 在杰罗尼摩位于老鼠新城的鼠洞里

options.en: At a ski resort in the mountains

explain.en: Grandfather announced the family would spend Christmas in New York at his best friend Klondyke MacMouse's apartment overlooking Central Park.
explain.zh: 爷爷宣布全家人要去纽约，在他最好的朋友克隆戴克·麦克鼠位于中央公园畔的公寓里过圣诞节。

q.en: What went wrong with Geronimo's luggage at the New York airport?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在纽约机场的行李出了什么岔子？

options.en: He grabbed the wrong yellow bag that looked just like his
options.zh: 他拿错了一个和他的一模一样的黄色包

options.en: The airline completely lost his bag
options.zh: 航空公司把他的包彻底弄丢了

options.en: A thief stole it from the carousel
options.zh: 一个小偷从行李转盘上偷走了它

options.en: He left it sitting on the plane

explain.en: At baggage claim Geronimo grabbed a yellow bag with a bright blue tag, but it turned out to belong to Mrs. A. Smith — not his own suitcase.
explain.zh: 在行李领取处，杰罗尼摩抓了一个带亮蓝色标签的黄色包，可它其实属于史密斯太太，并不是他自己的行李箱。

q.en: When Geronimo had no money for the taxi, what did the driver demand as payment?
q.zh: 当杰罗尼摩没钱付出租车费时，司机要求拿什么当作车费？

explain.en: Since Geronimo had no cash, the huge cabdriver snatched his beloved gold fountain pen as payment and zoomed away.
explain.zh: 因为杰罗尼摩身上没有现金，那个魁梧的司机一把夺走了他心爱的金色钢笔当作车费，然后开车跑了。

q.en: By the things inside her bag, what was Mrs. A. Smith's job?
q.zh: 从包里的东西来看，史密斯太太是做什么工作的？

options.en: An Egyptologist who studies ancient Egypt
options.zh: 研究古埃及的埃及学家

explain.en: Her bag held notebooks on ancient Egypt and an X-ray of a mummy, so Geronimo realized she was an Egyptologist.
explain.zh: 她的包里有关于古埃及的笔记和一具木乃伊的X光片，所以杰罗尼摩判断她是一位埃及学家。

q.en: How did Geronimo travel quickly from Columbia University to the Empire State Building?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩是怎样从哥伦比亚大学快速赶到帝国大厦的？

options.en: He rode a skateboard he found in a garbage can
options.zh: 他踩着从垃圾桶里找到的滑板

explain.en: Geronimo found a skateboard peeking out of a garbage can and rode it down Broadway all the way to the Empire State Building.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩从垃圾桶里发现一块滑板，踩着它沿着百老汇一路滑到了帝国大厦。

q.en: At Times Square, a famous star stepped onto the red carpet and gave Geronimo something. Who and what?
q.zh: 在时代广场，一位大明星走上红毯，还送了杰罗尼摩一样东西。那是谁，送了什么？

options.en: Mouselina gave him a red rose
options.zh: 大明星鼠塞莉娜送了他一朵红玫瑰
萨莉·拉特穆森送了他奶酪

options.en: Mrs. Smith gave him a phone
options.zh: 史密斯太太送了他一部手机

explain.en: The movie star Mouselina stepped from a limousine, kissed Geronimo's cheek, and gave him the red rose she was holding.
explain.zh: 电影明星鼠塞莉娜从豪华轿车里走出来，亲了杰罗尼摩的脸颊，还把捧着的红玫瑰送给了他。

q.en: At the American Museum of Natural History, what scared Geronimo so much that he fainted?
q.zh: 在美国自然历史博物馆里，是什么把杰罗尼摩吓得晕了过去？

options.en: A giant dinosaur skeleton and a model whale
options.zh: 一具巨大的恐龙骨架和一个鲸鱼模型

explain.en: Hiding in a garbage can, Geronimo popped out and saw a huge dinosaur skeleton and a whale model; thinking they were real, he fainted from fright.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩躲在垃圾桶里，探出头却看见一具巨大的恐龙骨架和一个鲸鱼模型，他以为它们是真的，吓得晕了过去。

q.en: How did Geronimo earn his ferry ride out to the Statue of Liberty?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩是靠什么赚到去自由女神像的渡轮船票的？

options.en: He scrubbed the ferry deck with a mop
options.zh: 他用拖把把渡轮甲板擦得干干净净

options.en: He paid with his gold watch

explain.en: With no money, Geronimo promised the ferry captain he would mop the deck until it shone, and the captain paid his entrance ticket in return.
explain.zh: 因为身无分文，杰罗尼摩向渡轮船长保证把甲板拖得锃亮，作为交换，船长替他付了入场船票。

q.en: What did 'Columb...' in Mrs. Smith's last appointment actually turn out to mean?
q.zh: 史密斯太太日程表上最后一项“哥伦……”实际上指的是什么？

options.en: Columbus Circle, where the MacMouses lived
options.zh: 哥伦布圆环，麦克鼠一家住的地方

explain.en: Geronimo realized 'Columb' could mean Columbus Circle, one corner of Central Park — and that is exactly where the MacMouse family lived.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩恍然大悟，“哥伦”可能指哥伦布圆环——中央公园的一角，而麦克鼠一家正好住在那里。

q.en: Who was Mrs. A. Smith really?

options.zh: 安娜贝拉·麦克鼠·史密斯，克隆戴克的女儿
伪装起来的萨莉·拉特穆森
一个在机场遇到的陌生人

explain.en: Mrs. A. Smith was Annabelle MacMouse Smith, Klondyke MacMouse's daughter, who had married Coconut Smith; she had Geronimo's real suitcase with the gifts.
explain.zh: 史密斯太太其实是安娜贝拉·麦克鼠·史密斯，克隆戴克·麦克鼠的女儿，她嫁给了椰子史密斯，而且正拿着装有礼物的杰罗尼摩的真正行李箱。
